title: Audit of books and accounts
doc_html:
§1278.  Audit of books and accounts

The authority shall cause an audit of its books and accounts to be made at least once each year by certified public accountants and the cost thereof may be treated as a part of the cost of construction or operations of a project or projects.  

Acts 1954, No. 232, §28.
